mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(prodNo) FROM product p
sellerUid = #{seller}
AND CAST(p.prodNo AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.prodName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM member m WHERE m.uid = p.sellerUid AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT p.prodNo AS no, p.prodName AS name, p.description, p.price, p.discount, p.deliveryFee, p.thumb1FileId, p.sellerUid, m.name AS seller, COALESCE(AVG(r.rating), 0) AS rating FROM product p JOIN member m ON m.uid = p.sellerUid LEFT JOIN review r ON r.prodNo = p.prodNo
p.cateId = #{cateId}
GROUP BY p.prodNo, p.prodName, p.description, p.price, p.discount, p.deliveryFee, p.thumb1FileId, p.sellerUid, m.name
ORDER BY p.sold DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY (p.price * (100 - p.discount) / 100) ASC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY (p.price * (100 - p.discount) / 100) DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY rating DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY COUNT(r.reviewNo) DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY p.prodNo DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.prodNo, p.cateId, p.prodName, p.description, p.maker, p.deliveryFee, p.price, p.discount, p.point, p.sold, COALESCE(SUM(pv.stock), 0) AS stock, parent.cateId AS rootCategoryId, parent.name AS rootCategoryName, c.name AS subCategoryName, p.thumb1FileId, p.thumb2FileId, p.thumb3FileId, p.detailInfoFileId, p.sellerUid, p.infoNoticeType, p.createdAt FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON c.cateId = p.cateId LEFT JOIN category parent ON parent.cateId = c.parentId LEFT JOIN product_variant pv ON pv.prodNo = p.prodNo WHERE p.prodNo = #{prodNo} GROUP BY p.prodNo, p.cateId, p.prodName, p.description, p.maker, p.deliveryFee, p.price, p.discount, p.point, p.sold, parent.cateId, parent.name, c.name, p.thumb1FileId, p.thumb2FileId, p.thumb3FileId, p.detailInfoFileId, p.sellerUid, p.infoNoticeType, p.createdAt
